zh.lifeSummary: Mrs. Helen Eaton於大約1566年出生在英國瓦維其可爾哈頓。她於大約1587年與Thomas Eaton結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1636年享年71歲，埋葬在英國瓦維其可爾哈頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs. Helen Eaton于大约1566年出生在英国瓦維其可爾哈頓。她于大约1587年与Thomas Eaton结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1636年享年71岁，埋葬在英国瓦維其可爾哈頓。

nameMeanings.name: Eaton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Eaton or Eton, such as Eaton Socon (Bedfordshire), Eaton (Cheshire), or Eton (Buckinghamshire), named from either Old English ēa ‘river’ or ēg ‘island, low-lying land’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.
History: Nathaneal Eaton, born in Coventry, England, c. 1609, came to MA in 1637 and was the first head of Harvard College, in 1638–39.

nameMeanings.name: Helen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of the name (Greek Hēlēnē) borne in classical legend by a famous beauty, wife of Menelaus, whose seizure by the Trojan prince Paris sparked off the Trojan War. Her name is of uncertain origin; it may be connected with a word meaning ‘ray’ or ‘sunbeam’ compare Greek hēlios ‘sun’. It has sometimes been taken as connected with the Greek word meaning ‘Greek’, Hellēn, but this is doubtful. In the early Christian period the name was borne by the mother of the Emperor Constantine, who is now usually known by the Latin version of her name, Helena. She is credited with having found the True Cross in Jerusalem. She was born in about 248 , probably in Bithynia. However, in medieval England it was believed that she had been born in Britain, which greatly increased the popularity of the name there.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: Mrs. Helen Eaton was born about 1566, in Hatton, Warwickshire, England. She married Thomas Eaton about 1587. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1636, at the age of 71, and was buried in Hatton, Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs. Helen Eaton est née environ 1566, à Hatton, Warwickshire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Thomas Eaton environ 1587. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1636, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterrée à Hatton, Warwickshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs. Helen Eaton wurde um 1566 in Hatton, Warwickshire, England geboren. Sie hat um 1587 Thomas Eaton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1636 im Alter von 71 Jahren und wurde in Hatton, Warwickshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs. Helen Eaton è nata il circa 1566 nel Hatton, Warwickshire, England. Lei sposato Thomas Eaton circa 1587. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1636, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolta a Hatton, Warwickshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Mrs. Helen Eatonは約1566年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアハットオンで生まれた。約1587年にThomas Eatonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1636年に71歳で死去し，イギリスワーウィクシュアイアハットオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs. Helen Eaton(은)는 대략 1566년 영국 워윅실르 해턴에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1587년 Thomas Eaton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1636년 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워윅실르 해턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs. Helen Eaton nasceu aproximadamente 1566, em Hatton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Thomas Eaton aproximadamente 1587. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1636, com 71 anos, e foi sepultada em Hatton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs. Helen Eaton родилась около 1566 г. в местности хаттон, варвиккшир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Eaton около 1587 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1636 г. в возрасте 71 год и была похоронена в местности хаттон, варвиккшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs. Helen Eaton nació aproximadamente 1566, en Hatton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Thomas Eaton aproximadamente 1587. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1636, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultada en Hatton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.
